debug_info.goal:
X : Sequent
s : Strategy tableauGame Builder
h : winning s (startPos X)
bt : BuildTree ⟨[], ⟨X, posOf [] X⟩⟩ := buildTree s [] X (posOf [] X) h
WS : Finset (Finset Formula) :=
  failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
M : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation) :=
  failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
⊢ failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)

failed_attempts:
let πroot : PreStateP bt .stop := sorry
    use .fromRoot πroot
    simp [bt.allPreStates_spec]
    sorry

let π := PreState.fromRoot (Classical.choice (by sorry))
    use π
    constructor
    · simp [BuildTree.allPreStates_spec]
    · sorry
refine ⟨(PreState.forms (.fromRoot (by sorry))).toFinset, ⟨.fromRoot (by sorry), by simp [BuildTree.allPreStates], rfl⟩, by sorry⟩

obtain ⟨π, hπ_mem, hπ_sub⟩ : ∃ π ∈ bt.allPreStates, X.toFinset ⊆ π.forms.toFinset := sorry
    exact ⟨_, ⟨π, hπ_mem, rfl⟩, hπ_sub⟩

obtain ⟨π, hπ, hX⟩ : ∃ π ∈ bt.allPreStates, X.toFinset ⊆ π.forms.toFinset := sorry
    exact ⟨π.forms.toFinset, ⟨π, hπ, rfl⟩, hX⟩

exact ⟨(PreState.forms (PreState.fromRoot sorry)).toFinset,
      ⟨PreState.fromRoot sorry, BuildTree.allPreStates_spec _, rfl⟩, sorry⟩

obtain ⟨π, h⟩ : ∃ π : PreState bt, X.toFinset ⊆ π.forms.toFinset := sorry
    exact ⟨π.forms.toFinset, ⟨π, BuildTree.allPreStates_spec, rfl⟩, h⟩

let π₀ : PreState bt := .fromRoot (by sorry)
    use π₀.forms.toFinset
    simp [BuildTree.allPreStates_spec]
    sorry

obtain ⟨π, h_in, h_sub⟩ : ∃ π ∈ bt.allPreStates, X.toFinset ⊆ π.forms.toFinset := sorry
    exact ⟨π.forms.toFinset, ⟨π, h_in, rfl⟩, h_sub⟩

have ⟨π, hπ⟩ : ∃ π : PreState bt, X.toFinset ⊆ (PreState.forms π).toFinset := sorry
    exact ⟨(PreState.forms π).toFinset, ⟨⟨π, ⟨BuildTree.allPreStates_spec π, rfl⟩⟩, hπ⟩⟩

obtain ⟨π, hπ_in, hπ_sub⟩ : ∃ π ∈ bt.allPreStates, X.toFinset ⊆ π.forms.toFinset := sorry
    use π.forms.toFinset
    simp [hπ_in, hπ_sub]
refine ⟨PreState.fromRoot (by sorry), by simp [BuildTree.allPreStates_spec], by sorry⟩
